Method provenance and key results

Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density-fitting; exact four-center integrals) in PySCF 2.x via chemkit

Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation)
Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet (Q = 0, M = 1); cation state Q = +1, M = 2; anion state Q = –1, M = 2
Convergence & warnings: All three SCF calculations converged; integrity.status = ok; integrity.trustworthy = true.  Warnings returned by chemkit are reproduced verbatim below.
